hero.headline: Book a consultation with a
hero.subtitle: Beep connects professionals and clients in Tunisia. Find the right consultant, pick a time, pay securely, and jump on a video call — all on one platform.

howItWorks.label: How it works
howItWorks.title: Three steps, that’s it.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Browse by category, specialty, or price. Read reviews from real clients. Every professional is verified.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Choose an available slot on their calendar. Pay securely — funds are held until the session completes.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Connect face-to-face in your browser. No downloads, no subscriptions. Just click and talk.

testimonials.label: Testimonials
testimonials.title: Trusted by thousands
testimonials.t1Text: I found an incredible English tutor on Beep in minutes. The video quality was perfect and booking was seamless. My IELTS score went from 6.0 to 7.5 in just 2 months!
testimonials.t2Text: As a coach, I can now offer sessions beyond the gym. Beep handles scheduling, payments, and video — I just focus on my clients. My income grew 40%.
testimonials.t3Text: The refund policy gives me confidence to try new pros. I booked a business consultant, and when my schedule changed, the cancellation was instant and fair.

cta.label: Get started today
cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.subtitle: Whether you’re looking for a professional or want to offer your services — Beep connects you in seconds.
cta.finePrint: No credit card required · Free for clients · Pros pay only when they earn

footer.description: Tunisia’s professional booking platform. 1-on-1 video sessions with verified pros.

marketplace.title: Marketplace
marketplace.subtitle: Discover and book sessions with verified professionals.
marketplace.noResults: No experts found. Try a different search or category.
marketplace.error: Failed to load experts. Please try again.

choosePath.title: How do you want to use Beep?
choosePath.subtitle: You can always change later.
choosePath.clientDesc: Browse verified professionals, book video sessions, and get personalized advice.
choosePath.expertDesc: Create your profile, set your availability, and start receiving clients online.

dashboard.bioPlaceholder: Describe your expertise and experience (min 10 chars)
dashboard.headline: Headline
dashboard.completeYourProfileDesc: Finish setting up your profile to start receiving bookings. You can browse as a client in the meantime.

onboarding.title: Become an Expert
onboarding.subtitle: Complete these steps to start receiving bookings on Beep
onboarding.stepDescProfile: Set up your public profile that clients will see
onboarding.stepDescExpertise: Tell us about your skills and qualifications
onboarding.stepDescPricing: Set your session price and duration
onboarding.stepDescPayout: How would you like to receive payments?
onboarding.bottomNote: You can always update your profile details later from your dashboard.
onboarding.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
onboarding.valSlugMin: Slug must be at least 3 characters
onboarding.valSlugMax: Slug must be at most 30 characters
onboarding.valSlugFormat: Slug must start and end with a letter or number
onboarding.valBioMin: Bio must be at least 10 characters
onboarding.headlinePlaceholder: e.g. Certified Personal Trainer & Nutrition Coach
onboarding.headlineHelp: A short tagline that describes what you do
onboarding.bioPlaceholder: Tell potential clients about yourself, your experience, and what they can expect from a session...
onboarding.searchSkills: Search skills or type your own...
onboarding.skillsHelp: Pick from suggestions or type your own. Press Enter to add.
onboarding.typeLanguage: Or type a language and press Enter
onboarding.timezoneHelp: Your available time slots will be displayed in this timezone
onboarding.bankTransferDesc: Receive payments to your bank account
onboarding.accountHolderPlaceholder: Full name as it appears on your account
onboarding.payoutNote: Payments will be processed manually and sent to your account after each completed session. You will receive your payout within 3-5 business days.
onboarding.valNameMin: Name must be at least 3 characters
onboarding.valNameFormat: Name must contain only letters, spaces, hyphens, and apostrophes
onboarding.valIbanFormat: IBAN must start with TN followed by 22 digits (24 characters total)
onboarding.valPhoneFormat: Enter a valid Tunisian number: +216 followed by 8 digits
onboarding.skipForNow: Skip for now — browse as a client
onboarding.nameHelp: Letters, spaces, hyphens and apostrophes only
onboarding.ibanHelp: Tunisian IBAN: TN59 followed by 20 digits
